buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run generate && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/cyberise run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://clerk.cyberise.org https://*.clerk.accounts.dev; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://cyberise.org https://clerk.cyberise.org https://*.clerk.accounts.dev wss://*.clerk.accounts.dev; frame-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://clerk.cyberise.org https://*.clerk.accounts.dev; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'
